questions.question: Explain the main difference between the chalk and talk method and the PowerPoint presentation method in terms of student engagement and active learning.
questions.hint: Focus on the key aspects of each method

questions.question: A lecturer uses the chalk and talk method to teach a 3-hour lecture on Complete Metric Spaces. The lecturer covers 10 topics in the lecture and has 20 students in the class. Which method do you think is more suitable for this lecture, and why?
questions.hint: Consider the time available, number of topics, and student engagement

questions.question: A lecturer wants to use PowerPoint presentations to teach a 2-hour lecture on Continuous Functions. How can the lecturer make the PowerPoint presentation more engaging and interactive for the students, and what are the benefits of using this method?
questions.hint: Focus on strategies for increasing student engagement and the advantages of using PowerPoint presentations
